## 9. Checklist

- [ ] Related PRD, ADR, TASK, or BUG is linked.
- [ ] Subagent usage is recorded.
- [ ] Spark dedup status is recorded when Spark was used.
- [ ] Validation evidence is included.
- [ ] Documentation is updated.
- [ ] No new production dependency was added without approval.
- [ ] Auth, payment, database, API contract, deployment, and security policy impact was checked.
- [ ] CODEOWNER review is requested when needed.
